about.title: Full-Stack Dasturchi
about.description1: Men zamonaviy, responsive va foydalanuvchiga qulay web ilovalar yaratishni yoqtiradigan dasturchiman. React, Laravel, Tailwind CSS va boshqa zamonaviy texnologiyalar bilan ishlayman.
about.description2: Mening maqsadim foydalanuvchilar va bizneslar uchun tezkor, chiroyli va sifatli digital tajribalar yaratish.

footer.description: React, Laravel va Tailwind CSS yordamida zamonaviy va responsive web ilovalar yarataman.

hero.name: Iqbolshoh
hero.description: Men React, Laravel va Tailwind CSS yordamida zamonaviy, tezkor va responsive web ilovalar yarataman.

notFound.title: Sahifa Topilmadi
notFound.description: Kechirasiz, siz qidirayotgan sahifa mavjud emas yoki ko‘chirilgan.

contact.title: Men Bilan Bog'laning
contact.description: Loyiha g'oyangiz bormi yoki birgalikda ishlamoqchimisiz? Istalgan vaqtda men bilan bog'lanishingiz mumkin.

projects.title: Loyihalar
projects.description: Bu yerda zamonaviy web texnologiyalar va clean UI dizayn yordamida yaratilgan so‘nggi loyihalarimni ko‘rishingiz mumkin.
